'''鈭歡-m-g''' ('''kagamag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queer|queer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queer|queer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-m-g
|-
! Lemma
| kagamag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigamag|thigamag]] || [[word:jigamag|jigamag]] || [[word:shigamag|shigamag]] || [[word:kigamag|kigamag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugamag|thuthugamag]] || [[word:jujugamag|jujugamag]] || [[word:shushugamag|shushugamag]] || [[word:kukugamag|kukugamag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugamag|thugamag]] || [[word:jugamag|jugamag]] || [[word:shugamag|shugamag]] || [[word:kugamag|kugamag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugamag|thugamag]] || [[word:jugamag|jugamag]] || [[word:shugamag|shugamag]] || [[word:kugamag|kugamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegamag|thegamag]] || [[word:jegamag|jegamag]] || [[word:shegamag|shegamag]] || [[word:kegamag|kegamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogamag|thothogamag]] || [[word:jojogamag|jojogamag]] || [[word:shoshogamag|shoshogamag]] || [[word:kokogamag|kokogamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogamag|thogamag]] || [[word:jogamag|jogamag]] || [[word:shogamag|shogamag]] || [[word:kogamag|kogamag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogamag|thogamag]] || [[word:jogamag|jogamag]] || [[word:shogamag|shogamag]] || [[word:kogamag|kogamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gamag|th忙gamag]] || [[word:j忙gamag|j忙gamag]] || [[word:sh忙gamag|sh忙gamag]] || [[word:k忙gamag|k忙gamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagamag|thathagamag]] || [[word:jajagamag|jajagamag]] || [[word:shashagamag|shashagamag]] || [[word:kakagamag|kakagamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagamag|thagamag]] || [[word:jagamag|jagamag]] || [[word:shagamag|shagamag]] || [[word:kagamag|kagamag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagamag|thagamag]] || [[word:jagamag|jagamag]] || [[word:shagamag|shagamag]] || [[word:kagamag|kagamag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagamag|shagamag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagamag|goshagamag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagamag|gokishagamag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagamagn眉|shagamagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagamagnkn眉|goshagamagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagamagn眉|gokishagamagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagamagsh毛|shagamagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagamagnksh毛|goshagamagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagamagsh毛|gokishagamagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagamagro|shagamagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagamagnkro|goshagamagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagamagro|gokishagamagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagamagmu|shagamagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagamagnkmu|goshagamagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagamagmu|gokishagamagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagamagsher|shagamagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagamagnksher|goshagamagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagamagsher|gokishagamagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagamagng|shagamagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagamagnkng|goshagamagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagamagng|gokishagamagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagamagya|shagamagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagamagnkya|goshagamagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagamagya|gokishagamagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagamagyam|shagamagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagamagnkyam|goshagamagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagamagyam|gokishagamagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagamagn眉sh毛|shagamagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagamagnkn眉sh毛|goshagamagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagamagn眉sh毛|gokishagamagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagamagn眉ro|shagamagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagamagnkn眉ro|goshagamagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagamagn眉ro|gokishagamagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagamagn眉mu|shagamagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagamagnkn眉mu|goshagamagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagamagn眉mu|gokishagamagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagamagsh毛n眉|shagamagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagamagnksh毛n眉|goshagamagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagamagsh毛n眉|gokishagamagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagamagsh毛ro|shagamagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagamagnksh毛ro|goshagamagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagamagsh毛ro|gokishagamagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagamagsh毛mu|shagamagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagamagnksh毛mu|goshagamagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagamagsh毛mu|gokishagamagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagamagron眉|shagamagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagamagnkron眉|goshagamagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagamagron眉|gokishagamagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagamagrosh毛|shagamagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagamagnkrosh毛|goshagamagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagamagrosh毛|gokishagamagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagamagromu|shagamagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagamagnkromu|goshagamagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagamagromu|gokishagamagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagamagmun眉|shagamagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagamagnkmun眉|goshagamagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagamagmun眉|gokishagamagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagamagmush毛|shagamagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagamagnkmush毛|goshagamagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagamagmush毛|gokishagamagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagamagmuro|shagamagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagamagnkmuro|goshagamagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagamagmuro|gokishagamagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
